## Necron Mercenaries

#### 0-3 Flayed One (Cost: 2 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Flayed One | 5”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | \-1 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Flayed One is equipped with Flayer Claws. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Flayer Claws.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL, CUMBERSOME, TWO-HANDED

**Abilities**

* **Endless.** This model always passes Casualty tests at the end of any battle. You must include it in every mission if at all possible.  
* **Flesh Hunger.** The Flayed One has \+1 DICE to Hit any model that has any BLOOD MARKERS in melee. If it begins its Activation within 8” of an enemy it can see that has at least one BLOOD MARKER, it must attempt to Charge that enemy as its first Action.

**Keywords**  
DEEP STRIKE, FEAR, NECRON, NEGATE GAS, NO PROMOTION, STEALTH

#### 0-1 Canoptek Reanimator (Cost: 5 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Canoptek Reanimator | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-3 | 60mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Canoptek Reanimator is equipped with an Atomizer Beam and Reanimator Claws. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Atomizer Beam.** 12”, IGNORE ARMOUR, TWO-HANDED  
* **Reanimator Claws.** Melee, CLEAVE

**Abilities**

* **Nanoscarab Reanimation Beam.** As an Action with a Success Roll with \+1 DICE, the Canoptek Reanimator can choose one allied NECRON model that is Reanimating within 6” that it can see. On a success, the model is no longer Reanimating and stands up.

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, LARGE, NECRON, NEGATE GAS, NO PROMOTION, TOUGH, VEHICLE

#### 0-1 Canoptek Wraith (Cost: 5 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Canoptek Wraith | 8”/Flying | \+1 | \+1 | \-2 | 50mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Canoptek Wraith is equipped with Whip Coils and a Transdimensional Beamer. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Whip Coils.** Melee, CLEAVE 2, STUN, TWO-HANDED  
* **Transdimensional Beamer.** 12”, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, PISTOL

**Abilities**

* **Wraith Form.** The Canoptek Wraith can move within close combat range of enemies even when it is not Charging, and it can end a Charge anywhere within close combat of the target(s). It ignores Blocking Terrain as well as enemy models when it moves during its Activation. If it is not Charging, it still must end this movement outside of close combat. The first time during its Activation it moves through any given enemy in this way, that enemy receives 1 BLOOD MARKER.

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, FLYING, LARGE, NECRON, NEGATE GAS, NO PROMOTION, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Lokhust Destroyer (Cost: 5 Glory)

Cannot be taken by Necrons (Destroyer Cult) Warbands.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Lokhust Destroyer | 8”/Flying | \+1 | \+0 | \-2 | 60mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Lokhust Destroyer can be equipped with a Gauss Cannon, two Maces, and Necrodermal Plating. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Gauss Cannon.** 36”, HEAVY, ARMOUR PIERCING 2  
* **Mace.** Melee  
* **Necrodermal Plating.** The model has NEGATE SHRAPNEL.

**Abilities**

* **Hard-Wired for Destruction.** If the Lokhust Destroyer model makes a ranged attack against the closest target available to it, add \+1 DICE to Hit with that attack.  
* **Heavy Gunner.** The Lokhust Destroyer can ignore the HEAVY Keyword of one ranged weapon they wield.

**Keywords**  
FLYING, LARGE, NECRON, NEGATE GAS

#### 0-1 Ophydian Destroyer (Cost: 4 Glory)

Cannot be taken by Necrons (Destroyer Cult) Warbands.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Ophydian Destroyer | 8”/Burrow | N/A | \+2 | \-1 | 50mm |

**Battlekit**  
An Ophydian Destroyer is equipped with two Hyperphase Swords.

* **Hyperphase Sword.** Melee, IGNORE ARMOUR, CRITICAL

**Abilities**

* **Tunnelling Horror.** If the Ophydian Destroyer takes an enemy Out of Action in melee, if it is not in melee with any other enemies, it can immediately move up to its movement speed.

**Keywords**  
BURROW, DEEP STRIKE (TUNNEL), LARGE, NECRON, NEGATE GAS, STEALTH

#### 0-1 Skorpekh Destroyer (Cost: 5 Glory)

Cannot be taken by Necrons (Destroyer Cult) Warbands.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Skorpekh Destroyer | 8”/Infantry | N/A | \+2 | \-2 | 50mm |

**Battlekit**  
An Skorpekh Destroyer is equipped with two Hyperphase Swords.

* **Hyperphase Sword.** Melee, IGNORE ARMOUR, CRITICAL

**Abilities**

* **Whirling Onslaught.** When this model makes a melee attack, if it Charged during this Activation, each of its attacks is made against each enemy it is in close combat with.

**Keywords**  
LARGE, NECRON, NEGATE GAS
